name: type-ahead
description: Inline code autocomplete powered by Anthropic, OpenAI-compatible LLMs (Ollama, vLLM, LM Studio), or LiteLLM Gateway

enumDescriptions: OpenAI Compatible (Ollama, vLLM, LM Studio, or any OpenAI-compatible server)
Anthropic (Claude models via the Anthropic Messages API)
LiteLLM Gateway (unified proxy for multiple LLM providers)
typeAhead.backend.description: Which backend to use for completions

typeAhead.model.description: Model name. For Anthropic: empty uses ANTHROPIC_SMALL_FAST_MODEL or claude-haiku-4-5. For OpenAI/LiteLLM: required (e.g., 'codellama:7b', 'gpt-4o-mini')

typeAhead.apiBaseUrl.description: Base URL for the API. Required for OpenAI/LiteLLM (e.g., http://localhost:11434/v1). For Anthropic: defaults to https://api.anthropic.com

typeAhead.apiKey.description: Static API key. Overridden by apiKeyHelper if set. Leave empty for local servers like Ollama that need no auth

typeAhead.apiKeyHelper.description: Shell command that outputs an API key on stdout (e.g., 'my-tool get-api-key'). Overrides apiKey when set. Key is generated on IDE open and refreshed on auth errors

typeAhead.excludePatterns.description: Glob patterns for files and folders where autocomplete is disabled. Examples: '**/*.md', '**/node_modules/**', '.env', '*.json'

typeAhead.customInstructions.description: Custom instructions appended to the system prompt sent to the LLM (e.g., 'Always use TypeScript strict types', 'Prefer functional programming patterns')

typeAhead.debounceMs.description: Debounce delay in milliseconds before triggering completion

typeAhead.contextLines.description: Number of lines of context before and after cursor to include

typeAhead.cacheSize.description: Number of completions to cache (0 to disable)

scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:integration
